languages.text: {n}Вы замечаете движение бровей — ваши слова явно укололи Уралона. Великан чуть склоняется к вам, прежде чем ответить:{/n} "Псайкер, соединивший наши умы, бессилен навредить тебе. Я — отнюдь".

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы замечаете движение бровей — ваши слова явно укололи Уралона. Великан чуть склоняется к вам, прежде чем ответить:{/n} "Псайкер, соединивший наши умы, бессилен навредить тебе. Я — отнюдь".
{n}Вы замечаете движение бровей — ваши слова явно укололи Уралона. Великан чуть склоняется к вам, прежде чем ответить:{/n} "Псайкер, соединивший наши умы, бессилен навредить тебе. Я — отнюдь".

languages.text: {n}You notice a slight twitch of his eyebrows — your words have clearly stung Uralon. The giant leans toward you before shooting back,{/n} "The psyker who connected our minds does not have the power to hurt you. But I do."
languages.original_text: {n}Вы замечаете движение бровей — ваши слова явно укололи Уралона. Великан чуть склоняется к вам, прежде чем ответить:{/n} "Псайкер, соединивший наши умы, бессилен навредить тебе. Я — отнюдь".

traits.locale_text: {n}You notice a slight twitch of the eyebrows — your words have clearly stung Uralon. The giant leans towards you before shooting back:{/n} "The psyker who connected our minds does not have the power to hurt you. But I do."

{n}You notice a slight twitch of his eyebrows — your words have clearly stung Uralon. The giant leans toward you before shooting back,{/n} "The psyker who connected our minds does not have the power to hurt you. But I do."

{n}You notice a slight twitch of his eyebrows — your words have clearly stung Uralon. The giant leans toward you before shooting back,{/n} "The psyker who connected our minds does not have the power to hurt you. But I do."

languages.text: {n}Du bemerkst ein leichtes Zucken seiner Augenbrauen — deine Worte haben Uralon offensichtlich getroffen. Der Riese beugt sich zu dir, bevor er zurückschießt{/n}: "Der Psyker, der unsere Gedanken verbunden hat, hat nicht die Macht, dich zu verletzen. Aber ich schon."
languages.original_text: {n}You notice a slight twitch of his eyebrows — your words have clearly stung Uralon. The giant leans toward you before shooting back,{/n} "The psyker who connected our minds does not have the power to hurt you. But I do."

traits.locale_text: {n}Du bemerkst ein leichtes Zucken seiner Augenbrauen — deine Worte haben Uralon offensichtlich getroffen. Der Riese beugt sich zu dir, bevor er zurückschießt{/n}: "Der Psyker, der unsere Gedanken verbunden hat, hat nicht die Macht, dich zu verletzen. Aber ich schon."

languages.text: {n}Vous remarquez un léger frémissement de ses sourcils — vos paroles ont visiblement piqué Uralon. Le géant se penche vers vous avant de répliquer{/n}: " Le psyker qui a connecté nos esprits n'a pas le pouvoir de vous blesser. Mais moi, j'en ai le pouvoir."
languages.original_text: {n}You notice a slight twitch of his eyebrows — your words have clearly stung Uralon. The giant leans toward you before shooting back,{/n} "The psyker who connected our minds does not have the power to hurt you. But I do."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vous remarquez un léger frémissement de ses sourcils — vos paroles ont visiblement piqué Uralon. Le géant se penche vers vous avant de répliquer{/n}: " Le psyker qui a connecté nos esprits n'a pas le pouvoir de vous blesser. Mais moi, j'en ai le pouvoir."

languages.text: {n}Notas un leve movimiento de sus cejas: tus palabras han picado claramente a Uralon.{/n} El {n}gigante se inclina hacia ti antes de replicar:{/n} "El psíquico que conectó nuestras mentes no tiene poder para hacerte daño. Pero yo sí".
languages.original_text: {n}You notice a slight twitch of his eyebrows — your words have clearly stung Uralon. The giant leans toward you before shooting back,{/n} "The psyker who connected our minds does not have the power to hurt you. But I do."

traits.locale_text: {n}Notas un leve movimiento de sus cejas: tus palabras han picado claramente a Uralon.{/n} El {n}gigante se inclina hacia ti antes de replicar:{/n} "El psíquico que conectó nuestras mentes no tiene poder para hacerte daño. Pero yo sí".

languages.text: {n}Kaşlarında hafif bir seğirme fark ediyorsunuz — sözleriniz Uralon'u açıkça etkilemiş. Dev sana doğru eğilip karşılık veriyor:{/n} "Zihinlerimizi birbirine bağlayan psişikçi sana zarar verecek güce sahip değil. Ama benim var."
languages.original_text: {n}You notice a slight twitch of his eyebrows — your words have clearly stung Uralon. The giant leans toward you before shooting back,{/n} "The psyker who connected our minds does not have the power to hurt you. But I do."
